_comment_coins: ADD or REMOVE coins here. All must be valid Bybit spot pairs priced between min_price_usd and max_price_usd.
_comment_price_filter: Bot skips coins whose price is outside this USD range at startup and each cycle.
_comment_timeframe: Primary candle timeframe for all strategies and regime detection. Options: 1m, 5m, 15m, 1h, 4h
_comment_risk: risk_per_trade_pct: % of capital risked per trade. max_drawdown_pct: emergency stop for the whole session.
_comment_loop: Seconds between each full scan cycle.
_comment_grid: Grid activates only when regime=RANGING and no position is open.
_comment_strategies: Each strategy can be individually enabled/disabled.
_comment_exchange: Set BYBIT_API_KEY and BYBIT_API_SECRET as environment variables. testnet=true for paper trading.
